## Description
<!-- Provide a high-level summary of the task and its business value -->

## Definition of Ready (DoR) Checklist
- [ ] **Value:** Business objective and "Why" are clearly defined.
- [ ] **Clarity:** Acceptance Criteria (AC) are documented and unambiguous.
- [ ] **Dependencies:** External blockers (APIs, third-party access, legal) are resolved.
- [ ] **Design:** High-fidelity UI/UX mockups or architectural diagrams are attached.
- [ ] **Estimates:** The task has been sized (Story Points/Hours) by the team.
- [ ] **Granularity:** The task is small enough to be completed within one iteration.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] AC 1
- [ ] AC 2

## Success Criteria (Test)
<!-- Provide a specific shell command to verify the change -->
`./init.sh`
